stem: A banking study surveys 30 approved loans and observes 13 positive outcomes out of 30 (43.3%). Estimate the true loan default rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.4333. Wilson 95% CI: [0.2737, 0.608]. Point estimate: 0.4409.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
Not recognizing that with n=30, the normal approximation may be poor
